aristotle.name: Aristotle
aristotle.subtitle: Course tutor
aristotle.studySessionDesc: Ask questions, get practice problems, or review for exams
aristotle.noSessions: Sessions appear here after you chat
aristotle.emptyStudy: What would you like to work on?

suggestions.connectCourse: How does this fit the bigger picture?
suggestions.guideMe: I'm stuck — give me a hint
suggestions.explainApproach: How should I think about this?
suggestions.reviewExam: Help me prep for the exam

toast.newSessionFailed: Couldn't start a new session. Try again.
toast.newSessionError: Something went wrong. Check your connection and try again.

config.title: Aristotle AI Tutor
config.description: A course-level AI tutor students can chat with while studying
config.enableDesc: Adds a floating tutor button on all course pages and a study tab on the course overview
config.personaPlaceholder: e.g., You are a senior Python developer with 15 years of experience. You love real-world analogies and humor to explain complex concepts.
config.personaHint: Write in second person ("You are..."). Include expertise level, personality traits, and tone of voice.
config.approachPlaceholder: e.g., Use the Socratic method — ask probing questions instead of giving direct answers. Start simple, then increase complexity.
config.approachHint: Socratic questioning, direct explanation, step-by-step walkthroughs — pick what fits your subject.
config.boundariesPlaceholder: e.g., Never solve exercises directly. Don't provide copy-paste code answers. Redirect students to think step by step.
config.boundariesHint: What Aristotle should refuse to do. Students will test these — be specific.

login.title: Login
login.description: Enter your email below to login to your account

forgotPassword.title: Reset Your Password
forgotPassword.description: Type in your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password

success.title: Check Your Email

updatePassword.description: Please enter your new password below.

signupSuccess.title: Thank you for signing up!
signupSuccess.body: You've successfully signed up. Please check your email to confirm your account before signing in.

student.title: My Learning
student.welcome: Welcome back! Continue where you left off.
student.noCourses: You haven't enrolled in any courses yet.

student.pickCourseDescription: Browse our curated catalog and enroll in individual courses that fit your needs.
student.unlimitedAccessDescription: Unlock every course, exam, and our AI learning assistant for one monthly price.
student.activeSubscriptionDesc: You have full access — browse courses and enroll in any that interest you.
student.startJourneyDesc: Enroll in a course to get started.

onboarding.title: Getting Started

onboarding.completeLessonDesc: Open a course and finish at least one lesson.

welcome.title: Welcome to Your Dashboard
welcome.description: This is your learning hub. You'll see a personalized greeting and a quick way to continue where you left off.

stats.title: Your Progress at a Glance
stats.description: Track your learning stats — lessons completed, courses in progress, and courses finished.

courses.title: Your Courses
courses.description: Your enrolled courses appear here with progress bars. Click any course to jump back in and continue learning.

sidebar.title: Leaderboard & Activity
sidebar.description: See how you rank against other students, check upcoming exams, and review your recent activity.

sidebarBrowse.title: Discover New Courses
sidebarBrowse.description: Browse the full course catalog to find new topics that interest you and enroll with one click.

sidebarProgress.title: Progress Report
sidebarProgress.description: Get a detailed breakdown of your learning progress across all courses, including time spent and completion rates.

teacher.title: Instructor Dashboard
teacher.subtitle: Here's what's happening with your courses and students today.

welcome.title: Welcome to Your Dashboard
welcome.description: This is your teaching hub. See an overview of your courses, student activity, and quick actions to manage your content.

stats.title: Your Teaching Stats
stats.description: Track your key metrics — total courses, active students, and exam submissions at a glance.

courses.title: Your Courses
courses.description: All your courses appear here with lesson counts and student enrollment. Click Edit to update content or Preview to see the student view.

sidebarCourses.title: Course Management
sidebarCourses.description: Access your full course list from here. View, edit, and manage all your courses in one place.

sidebarCreate.title: Create a New Course
sidebarCreate.description: Click here to start building a new course. Add a title, description, and start adding lessons right away.

header.title: Course Overview
header.description: This is your course management hub. You can see the course title, status badge, and enrolled student count at a glance.

tabs.title: Content Tabs
tabs.description: Switch between Lessons, Exercises, Exams, Students, and Certificates. Each tab lets you manage a different aspect of your course.

lessons.title: Lessons
lessons.description: Build your curriculum here. Add lessons in sequence — students will progress through them in order. Click any lesson to edit its content.

exercises.title: Practice Exercises
exercises.description: Create hands-on exercises so students can apply what they've learned. Supports coding challenges, quizzes, essays, and more.

preview.title: Preview Your Course
preview.description: See exactly what students will see. Preview your course content before publishing to make sure everything looks right.

settings.title: Course Settings
settings.description: Configure your course details — title, description, thumbnail, category, and publish status. You can also delete the course here.

onboarding.title: Getting Started
onboarding.subtitle: Complete these steps to set up your first course.
onboarding.createCourseDesc: Start by giving your course a title and description.
onboarding.addLessonDesc: Add content for your students to learn from.
onboarding.publishCourseDesc: Make your course visible to students.

courses.title: Your Courses
courses.description: Manage, edit and track performance for all your educational content.
courses.noCoursesDesc: You haven't created any courses yet. Start your teaching journey today!

manageCourse.notFoundDesc: This course doesn't exist or you don't have access to it.
manageCourse.notAuthor: Only the course author can manage this course.
manageCourse.dangerZoneDesc: Deleting a course is permanent and cannot be undone. Students who are enrolled will lose access immediately.
manageCourse.sequentialCompletionDescription: When enabled, students must complete lessons in order. They cannot skip ahead to later lessons.

curriculum.title: Curriculum
curriculum.description: Build your course structure lesson by lesson.

practice.title: Practice Exercises
practice.description: Help students apply what they've learned with hands-on exercises.
practice.pageDescription: Design practice exercises for your students. Use AI templates or build from scratch.
practice.emptyStateDescription: Exercises help students practice and master the course material. Start with an AI template or build your own.
practice.manageOnPage: Manage exercises on the dedicated page.

assessments.title: Assessments
assessments.description: Evaluate student knowledge with exams and quizzes.

studentList.title: Enrolled Students
studentList.description: View and manage students enrolled in this course.
studentList.noStudents: No students enrolled in this course yet.

certificates.title: Certificates
certificates.description: Configure and manage certificates for this course.

templates.title: Certificate Template
templates.description: Configure how the certificate will look and what it will represent.
templates.descriptionPlaceholder: This certificate confirms the completion of...
templates.qrCodeDescription: Enhance trust by allowing public verification
templates.logoDescription: Upload your school or organization logo to appear on certificates
templates.signatureImageDescription: Upload a signature image (transparent PNG recommended)
templates.minLessonCompletionHint: Percentage of lessons that must be completed to earn the certificate
templates.minExamPassScoreHint: Minimum score required on exams to qualify for the certificate
templates.requiresAllExamsHint: Students must pass every exam in the course, not just the average
templates.enableExpirationHint: Certificates will expire after the specified number of days

preview.title: Certificate Preview
preview.successfullyCompleted: has successfully completed the requirements for
preview.livePreviewHint: Live preview — updates as you type

issued.title: Issued Certificates
issued.noIssued: No certificates issued yet. Issue certificates from the Students tab.
issued.revokeConfirm: Revoke this certificate? The student will lose their credential and the verification link will stop working.

header.title: Course Overview
header.description: This is your course management hub. Here you can see the course title, status, and enrollment count.

tabs.title: Content Tabs
tabs.description: Navigate between lessons, exercises, exams, students, and certificates using these tabs.

lessons.title: Lessons
lessons.description: Manage your course curriculum here. Add, reorder, and edit lessons to build your course structure.

exercises.title: Exercises
exercises.description: Create practice exercises to help students apply what they've learned.

preview.title: Preview Course
preview.description: See your course as students will see it. Check the layout and content before publishing.

settings.title: Course Settings
settings.description: Configure course details, pricing, visibility, and other settings.

newCourse.title: Create New Course
newCourse.description: Fill in the basic information about your course

courseForm.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe what students will learn in this course...
courseForm.thumbnailHint: Provide a URL to an image (16:9 aspect ratio recommended)

statusHints.draft: Only you can see this course.
statusHints.published: Course is visible to students and ready for enrollment.
statusHints.archived: Course is hidden from catalog but existing students retain access.

courseForm.limitReachedDesc: Your {plan} plan is limited to {limit} courses. You currently have {current} courses. Please upgrade your plan to create more courses.
courseForm.approachingLimitDesc: You have used {current} of {limit} courses on your {plan} plan.

courseDelete.enrolledInCourse: currently enrolled in "{title}". Deleting will immediately remove their access.
courseDelete.archiveSuggestion: Consider archiving instead — enrolled students will keep access, but the course won't appear to new students.
courseDelete.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete "{title}"? This action cannot be undone.

examBuilder.descriptionPlaceholder: Briefly describe what this exam covers so students know what to expect.
examBuilder.durationHint: In minutes. Leave empty for untimed exams.
examBuilder.noQuestionsDesc: Use the buttons above to add your first question.
examBuilder.trueFalseHint: Students pick True or False — select the correct answer above.
examBuilder.aiGradingNotice: AI will grade this automatically. Add criteria below to guide the evaluation.
examBuilder.gradingRubricPlaceholder: e.g. A complete answer should mention X, explain Y, and provide an example of Z.
examBuilder.gradingRubricHint: Describe what a strong answer looks like.
examBuilder.aiGradingCriteriaPlaceholder: e.g. Check that the student explains the cause-effect relationship and uses at least one example.
examBuilder.aiGradingCriteriaHint: Tell the AI exactly what to look for when grading.
examBuilder.expectedKeywordsHint: Key terms the answer should include, separated by commas.
examBuilder.saveError: Couldn't save the exam. Check your connection and try again.

lessonEditor.descriptionPlaceholder: One-line overview shown in the course curriculum.
lessonEditor.videoUrlHint: Paste a YouTube link to embed a video in this lesson.
lessonEditor.sequenceHint: Position of this lesson in the course curriculum.
lessonEditor.aiTaskDescription: Add an interactive AI challenge students complete after the lesson.
lessonEditor.aiTaskPromptPlaceholder: e.g. Present yourself in English using at least 5 sentences.
lessonEditor.aiTaskPromptHint: The task students will see. Be specific about what they need to do.
lessonEditor.aiGradingInsPlaceholder: e.g. Check for correct grammar, at least 5 sentences, and a greeting.
lessonEditor.aiGradingInsHint: Tell the AI how to evaluate whether the student completed the task correctly.
lessonEditor.aiTaskOptionalHint: Skip this if the lesson doesn't need a practice task.
lessonEditor.contentHint: Write in MDX — Markdown with components like Callout, Steps, and Quiz.
lessonEditor.previewWriting: Start writing to see a preview...
lessonEditor.readyForContent: Title saved. Now add the lesson content.
lessonEditor.saveError: Couldn't save the lesson. Check your connection and try again.
lessonEditor.resourcesDescription: Upload downloadable files for students (PDFs, worksheets, etc.)
lessonEditor.publishAtHint: Leave empty to publish manually. Scheduled lessons auto-publish at the set time.
lessonEditor.saveFirstForResources: Save the lesson as a draft first to upload resources.

header.title: Lesson Editor
header.description: This is where you build your lesson. The breadcrumb shows which course this lesson belongs to.

steps.title: Three-Step Workflow
steps.description: Details — set the title, description, and video. Content — write the lesson body. AI Task — optionally add an interactive challenge graded by AI.

editorMode.title: Visual or Code
editorMode.description: Switch between the Visual block editor (drag-and-drop) and the MDX code editor. Both produce the same output — use whichever you prefer.

preview.title: Live Preview
preview.description: Toggle the side-by-side preview panel to see exactly what students will see as you write.

save.title: Save & Publish
save.description: Save Draft keeps your work without making it visible to students. Publish makes the lesson live immediately.

exerciseBuilder.titlePlaceholder: e.g. Build a Todo App with React Hooks
exerciseBuilder.descriptionPlaceholder: What will students practice in this exercise?
exerciseBuilder.aiConfigDesc: Set up the instructions students see and how the AI grades their work.
exerciseBuilder.studentInsPlaceholder: Describe clearly what the student needs to do. Be specific about deliverables and expectations.
exerciseBuilder.studentInsHint: Tip: Use a template below to start with a proven prompt.
exerciseBuilder.aiSystemPromptPlaceholder: You are an expert evaluator. Grade the student's submission based on...
exerciseBuilder.readyForAI: Next: set up how the AI will evaluate student submissions.
exerciseBuilder.audioSetupDesc: Define the speaking topic, scoring rubric, and attempt limits.
exerciseBuilder.topicPromptPlaceholder: e.g. Explain the importance of renewable energy in 1-2 minutes.
exerciseBuilder.topicPromptHint: The topic or question students will address in their recording.
exerciseBuilder.rubricFillerWordsDesc: Flag excessive um, uh, like, etc.
exerciseBuilder.passingScoreHint: Score needed to pass (0-100). Students below this must retry.
exerciseBuilder.dailyAttemptsHint: How many tries per day. Set 0 for unlimited.
exerciseBuilder.saveError: Couldn't save the exercise. Check your connection and try again.

finalReview.title: Final Review & Feedback
finalReview.teacherFeedbackPlaceholder: Provide overall feedback on the student's performance...
finalReview.finalNotice: Saving will mark this submission as teacher-reviewed.

examSubmissionsReview.title: Exam Submissions
examSubmissionsReview.description: Review and grade student submissions for this exam.

examSubmissions.title: Submissions
examSubmissions.description: Review and grade student exam submissions ({count} total)
examSubmissions.attentionAlert: These submissions have been flagged for review due to low AI confidence scores or pending teacher evaluation.

templates.description: Manage your reusable AI prompt templates for lessons and exercises.

templates.editDescription: Modify your prompt template and its variables.
templates.yourTemplatesDescription: System templates are available for everyone. You can edit or delete your own templates.
templates.deleteConfirmDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this template? This action cannot be undone.

templateSelector.noVariablesMsg: This template has no variables to configure. Click "Apply Template" to use it.

aiPreview.readyDesc: This simulates a student session with your current prompts. Start by asking a question.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Customize how your school looks. Changes apply to all students and teachers immediately.

theme.title: Theme
theme.description: Pick a color theme, font, and border radius. Or enter a preset code from shadcn/ui.
theme.shuffleHint: Randomly combine a color theme, font, and border radius
theme.borderRadiusHint: Controls the roundness of buttons, cards, inputs, and other elements.
theme.fontFamilyHint: Choose a font for your school. All fonts are loaded from Google Fonts.
theme.customCodeHint: Enter a preset code from <link>shadcn/ui create</link>. The full theme (colors, radius, font) will be applied from the preset.
theme.resetDescription: Revert to the platform's default purple theme
theme.applySuccess: Theme applied — reload to see the full effect

theme.fontSuccess: Font updated — reload to see the full effect

apiTokens.title: API Tokens
apiTokens.description: Generate tokens to connect Claude Desktop or other MCP clients to the LMS.

howToConnect.title: How to Connect
howToConnect.description: Set up Claude Desktop or other MCP clients to access your LMS data.
howToConnect.step1: Create a token above and copy the Claude Desktop config snippet.
howToConnect.step2: Open Claude Desktop settings and find the MCP servers configuration file.
howToConnect.step3: Paste the config snippet and save.
howToConnect.step4: Restart Claude Desktop — you should see the LMS tools available.

yourTokens.title: Your Tokens
yourTokens.empty: No tokens yet. Create one to get started.

createDialog.title: Create API Token
createDialog.description: Generate a token for MCP client access.

revealDialog.title: Token Created
revealDialog.description: Copy this token now. It won't be shown again.

landing.heroTitle:
Master your
Future with
LMS V2
landing.heroSubtitle: The ultimate learning platform for developers
landing.heroDescription: Master the latest technologies with our AI-powered platform. Interactive, fast, and designed for modern learning.
landing.featuresDescription: We've designed LMS V2 to provide you with the best possible educational experience using cutting-edge technology.
landing.feature1Description: Get instant help and deep code reviews powered by state-of-the-art AI models.
landing.feature2Description: Lessons that come to life. Interact with code directly on the platform securely.
landing.feature3Description: Earn points, unlock achievements, and maintain your learning streak with our incentive system.
landing.feature4Description: Validate your skills with digital certificates you can share on your professional profiles.

cta.title: Ready to start your journey?
cta.description: Join thousands of developers who are already improving their skills with LMS V2.

creators.heroTitle: Create, Sell & Scale Your Online Courses with AI
creators.heroSubtitle: The first AI-native platform for course creators. Auto-grade exams, engage students with gamification, and grow your business — no plugins needed.

differentiators.title: Why Creators Choose LMS V2
differentiators.subtitle: Three things that set us apart from every other course platform.

ai.title: AI Auto-Grading
ai.description: AI grades exams and provides personalized feedback automatically. Save hours of manual grading.

gamification.title: Built-in Gamification
gamification.description: XP, levels, streaks, achievements, and a rewards store. Keep students engaged like Duolingo.

modern.title: Modern & Fast
modern.description: Built on Next.js and Supabase. Your school loads instantly, works on any device, and scales automatically.

features.title: Everything You Need to Teach Online
features.subtitle: From content creation to payments, we handle the infrastructure so you can focus on teaching.

editor.title: Rich Content Editor
editor.description: MDX-powered lessons with code blocks, images, embeds, and interactive components. Write once, render beautifully.

exams.title: Exam Builder
exams.description: Multiple choice, open-ended, and true/false questions. AI grades free-text answers with detailed feedback.

exercises.title: Exercise System
exercises.description: Interactive coding challenges with an AI assistant that guides students through problem-solving.

payments.title: Stripe Payments
payments.description: Sell courses individually or via subscription plans. Accept credit cards with zero platform transaction fees.

dashboard.title: Student Dashboard
dashboard.description: Beautiful progress tracking, lesson completions, achievements, and streak counters that motivate students.

analytics.title: Analytics & Insights
analytics.description: Track enrollments, revenue, completion rates, and student engagement from your teacher dashboard.

comparison.title: See How We Compare
comparison.subtitle: We built LMS V2 to give creators more features at a fraction of the cost.
comparison.footnote: * Udemy is free to publish but takes up to 63% revenue share on organic sales.

pricing.title: Plans That Grow With You
pricing.subtitle: Start free, upgrade when you're ready. No hidden fees, no surprises.

cta.title: Start Building Your Course Today
cta.subtitle: Join hundreds of creators who are already earning revenue on LMS V2. Your first course is free.

about.title: Built for learning, by educators
about.description: LMS V2 is a modern learning platform that helps teachers create courses and students learn with clarity. We focus on speed, accessibility, and delightful UX.
about.missionDescription: Make high-quality learning accessible. We build tools that empower teachers and keep students engaged through clear content, progressive feedback, and reliable assessments.
about.feature1: Courses and lessons with MDX support
about.feature3: Teacher tools for building and grading exams

innovation.title: Constant Innovation
innovation.desc: We use the latest technologies to offer a cutting-edge learning experience.

accessibility.title: Universal Accessibility
accessibility.desc: We design so that everyone can learn, regardless of their abilities or location.

quality.title: Educational Quality
quality.desc: We are committed to excellence in every lesson and resource we offer.

coursesCatalog.title: Educational Courses
coursesCatalog.description: Master the latest technologies and advance your career with our premium, expert-led development tutorials and interactive lessons.

emptyState.title: No courses listed yet
emptyState.description: We are currently preparing more educational content for you. Please check back later!

courseSearch.noResults: No courses found matching your search.

pricing.title: Choose Your Learning Path
pricing.description: Unlock your potential with our flexible pricing plans designed for learners of all levels. Upgrade anytime as your skills grow.

empty.title: New Plans Coming Soon
empty.description: We're currently updating our subscription options to bring you more value. Check back shortly for updated pricing.

questions.discounts: Do you offer discounts for students?

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.description: Follow these simple steps to complete your purchase
howItWorks.step1: Submit the payment request form with your contact information
howItWorks.step2: Receive payment instructions via email (bank transfer, invoice, etc.)
howItWorks.step3: Complete the payment using your preferred method
howItWorks.step4: Get instant access once payment is confirmed

welcome.title: Welcome, {name}!
welcome.description: Let's set up your online school in just a few steps. You'll be ready to create courses in under 5 minutes.
welcome.step1: Name your school and tell students what you teach
welcome.step2: Choose a color theme, font, and style for your school
welcome.step3: Create your first course and start teaching

school.title: Your School
school.description: Give your school a name and description that students will see.
school.namePlaceholder: e.g. Code Academy, Design School, Music Lab
school.nameHint: This appears in the navbar, emails, and certificates
school.descriptionPlaceholder: What do you teach? Who is it for?
school.descriptionHint: A short description for your school's landing page

branding.title: Brand Your School
branding.description: Pick a color theme, font, and border radius for your school

payment.title: Payment Setup
payment.description: Connect your Stripe account to start accepting payments from students.
payment.whyDescription: Accept payments and get paid directly to your bank account.
payment.benefit2: Automatic payouts to your bank account
payment.benefit4: Track all revenue in your dashboard
payment.revenueSplitNote: You keep 80% of all course sales. The platform fee covers hosting, support, and maintenance.
payment.skipWarning: You can connect your payment account later from Settings, but you won't be able to sell courses until you do.

ready.title: You're All Set!
ready.description: Your school is configured and ready to go. What would you like to do next?

complete.error: Failed to save settings. Please try again.

billing.title: Billing
billing.description: Manage your school's subscription and billing
billing.freePlanNote: You are on the free plan. Upgrade to unlock more features.
billing.pastDue: Your payment is past due. Please update your payment method to avoid service interruption.

upgradePage.title: Upgrade Your Plan
upgradePage.description: Choose the plan that best fits your school's needs

platformPricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
platformPricing.description: Start free and scale as you grow. No hidden fees, no long-term contracts. Upgrade or downgrade anytime.

cta.title: Ready to get started?
cta.description: Create your school for free and upgrade whenever you need more.

landingPageBuilder.title: Pages
landingPageBuilder.subtitle: Design and publish custom pages for your school — landing pages, about, contact, and more.
landingPageBuilder.createFirstDescription: Start from a template or build from scratch. Create landing pages, about pages, FAQ pages, and more.

featureGate.title: Page Builder
featureGate.description: Create beautiful, customizable pages for your school with our drag-and-drop builder. Available on Starter plan ($9/mo) and above.

pageCard.publishFirst: Publish the page first before activating it.

templatePicker.choosePageTypeDescription: Choose a page type or enter a custom URL slug. This determines where the page will be accessible.

audio.micDenied: Microphone access denied. Please allow microphone access and try again.
audio.unsupportedFile: Unsupported file type. Allowed: MP3, M4A, OGG, WAV, WebM, AAC.
